mentions.note: Logistics company delivered solid quarter and up 5% but sales declined 6.5% YoY; benefits from market-share gains, not freight recovery; weak ocean and truckload pricing; up 130% from crisis lows despite weak freight demand.
Popped 5% on solid quarter; stock rallied 130% from liberation-day lows; benefiting from market share gains and self-help despite weak freight market with sales down 6.5% YoY; still terrific stock.
